title: Thiruvaloor Mahadeva temple
tagline: Thiruvaloor Mahadeva temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Thiruvaloor Mahadeva Temple is situated in Thiruvaloor kara of Alangad Village, in Ernakulam district.
overview.description: Thiruvaloor Mahadeva Temple is situated in Thiruvaloor kara of Alangad Village, in Ernakulam district. This temple is listed among the famous siva temples in Kerala, India. The idol here is believed to be an Agni Pratishta, i.e., with Lord Siva's third eye open. You can see the pond situated in east direction of the temple in line with the idol, in sree kovil.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Panayikulam
topPlaces.description: Panayikulam is a small village which falls in the Alangad Grama Panchayat, Paravur Taluk, Kerala, India. It is just near to Aluva town.

topPlaces.name: Alangad
topPlaces.description: Alangad is a village located in Paravur Taluk of Ernakulam District in the Indian state of Kerala. It lies almost in the middle of North Paravur and Aluva.

topPlaces.name: Kadungalloor
topPlaces.description: Kadungalloor, IPA: [kɐɖuŋːɐlːuːr], is a village situated near Aluva. The village belongs to the Paravur Taluk of the Ernakulam district in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Koonammavu
topPlaces.description: Koonammavu (Malayalam: [kuːnɐmːaːʋə̆]) is a northern suburb of Kochi city which is associated in the Kochi metropolitan area. Koonammavu (Valluvally) is a census town in Kottuvally Panchayat, North Paravur Taluk, Ernakulam District, Kerala, India and lies between Edappally and North Paravur adjacent to Varappuzha.

topPlaces.name: Karumalloor
topPlaces.description: Karumallur is a village in Paravur Taluk, Ernakulam district in the Indian state of Kerala. Karumalloor is a panchayat in Ernakulam District.

topPlaces.name: Kunnukara
topPlaces.description: Kunnukara is a census town and panchayat in Paravur Taluk of Ernakulam district, Kerala, India. The village is situated on the airport road connecting North Paravur (NH66) and Nedumbassery (NH544).

topPlaces.name: Mangalapuzha bridge
topPlaces.description: The Mangalapuzha bridge is a bridge in Aluva, Kerala, India. This bridge connects Desom and Aluva town.

topPlaces.name: Thottakkattukara
topPlaces.description: Thottakkattukara is a locality in the Aluva, Kerala, India. It is connected through all types of transportation.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Thiruvaloor Mahadeva temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Thiruvaloor Mahadeva temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Thiruvaloor Mahadeva temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (11 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (17 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Thiruvaloor Mahadeva temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Thiruvaloor Mahadeva temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Thiruvaloor Mahadeva temple?
faq.a: Stays in Thiruvaloor Mahadeva temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Thiruvaloor Mahadeva temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Panayikulam, Alangad, Kadungalloor, Koonammavu, Karumalloor.
